description: Note addressed to Yaʿaqov Abū l-Munā. The sender, a scribe, already sent with Abū Manṣūr the cantor what he needed to send, and asks the addressee to send him paper and 10.5 dirhams for expenses. (Information from Goitein's index card.) NB: Goitein refers to ENA 4011.24 as ENA 4011.23.
description_he: פתק לאברהם יעקב אבו אל-מונא מסופר; בקשה לנייר ו-10.5 דרהם להוצאות
